seo.title: Hotline HQ — Find Any Used Auto Part in 2 Seconds | Salvage Yard Parts Locator
seo.description: Stop losing sales when you don't have the part. Broadcast once to 500+ salvage yards — get an answer in 2 seconds. The fastest way to locate and sell used auto parts.
seo.keywords: find used auto parts fast, used auto parts locator, salvage yard parts finder, locate used car parts, sell used auto parts to yards, junkyard parts sourcing, used OEM parts supplier, auto parts interchange, salvage yard parts network, used car parts wholesale, auto recycler parts locator, find junkyard parts near me

hero.eyebrow: The parts-locating voice network for auto recyclers
hero.heading: Every “we don’t have it” is a customer walking out. It doesn’t have to be.
hero.subheading: The part you don’t have is sitting in somebody’s yard. Hotline HQ is the always-on voice network connecting 500+ salvage yards — broadcast once, get an answer in seconds, and keep the sale.
hero.listenCta: Listen to a real sell call
hero.listenSub: Hear a live broadcast from the network

listenLive.heading: This is what a saved sale sounds like.
listenLive.lede: One sentence into a handset, a two-second answer, and a customer who didn’t walk. Press play — the {{room}} room is on the air right now.
listenLive.errorFallback: Something went wrong — press play to try again
listenLive.liveQuietSub: You're live — the line can be quiet for a few minutes between calls
listenLive.idleSub: Free to listen — no signup, your mic stays off
listenLive.micNote: Listen-only. Your microphone is never used.
listenLive.quietStandby: Standing by — broadcasts come in bursts, and the line can sit quiet for a few minutes between calls. Stay tuned.
listenLive.quietRecent: Activity shows up here as yards key their mics.
listenLive.ctaText: Like what you hear? Your yard can be on this line too.
listenLive.ctaButton: Click Here to Sign Up — It’s Free

publicBroadcast.heroSub: The part you don’t have is sitting in somebody’s yard. Hotline HQ connects 500+ salvage yards — broadcast once, get an answer in seconds, and keep the sale.
publicBroadcast.errorMessage: This broadcast link may have been revoked or is no longer available.

video.heading: Watch a part get located.
video.subheading: This is the actual hotline — a real broadcast going out, and a yard answering back. No demo environment, no mockups.
video.playLabel: Watch the hotline in action · 1 min

problem.heading: How long does it take you to find a part? 30 minutes? An hour?

inventoryDb.label: Inventory databases
inventoryDb.flaw: Stale listings, and you're result #38 of 40. The part shows in stock — until you drive out and it's already gone.

callingAround.label: Calling around
callingAround.flaw: Forty minutes of hold music to check five yards. Your customer already bought the part somewhere else.

facebook.label: Facebook groups
facebook.flaw: Your post is buried within the hour, and nobody who can actually sell the part is watching the feed.

hotline.label: The Hotline HQ network
hotline.flaw: One voice broadcast. Every counter in your region hears it right now, and the yard that has it answers you back in seconds.

midCta.heading: Ready to stop losing sales?
midCta.subheading: Join 500+ yards already on the network. Set up takes 30 seconds.

how.heading: One broadcast. One answer. One sale saved.
how.footnote: Unanswered? The request is logged, escalated to neighboring rooms, and sent to the entire network as a message — a miss in your region isn’t a miss on the network.

step1.title: Broadcast the request
step1.copy: A customer asks for a part you don't have. Pick up the handset and say it once — every yard in your region hears it instantly.

step2.title: A yard answers
step2.copy: Members monitor the room hands-free. The yard sitting on your part unmutes and replies. Typical answer time is about two seconds.

step3.title: Close the sale
step3.copy: Talk it through live or take it private. Your customer gets the part, both yards get paid — and the call is logged and recorded.

demo.heading: Run a sell call. Watch the yards bid.
demo.subheading: Pick a part and put it on the air. This is exactly what your counter person does — minus the mouse.
demo.simNote: Simulated replies. On the real network this takes one spoken sentence.

rooms.heading: Twelve rooms. Every major market.
rooms.subheading: Your yard lives in its home room and is profiled into nearby regions — and you can switch rooms straight from the phone when the hunt goes wide.
rooms.signupPickRoom: Sign Up Free — pick your room

system.heading: Built like shop equipment, not software.
system.subheading: No apps to update, no passwords on sticky notes. It's a piece of counter equipment that pays its membership back on one saved sale.

f1.title: Always on
f1.copy: If the line ever drops, it reconnects on its own. Your phone stays in the room day and night without anyone touching it.

f2.title: Hands-free listening
f2.copy: The room plays quietly at your counter. Pick up the handset to talk, put it down to go quiet. No apps, no logins, no screens.

f3.title: Phone or computer
f3.copy: We ship you a desk phone that's ready to go — plug it in and you're on the air. Prefer the computer? It works in your browser too.

f4.title: Every call on record
f4.copy: Every request is saved and recorded, along with who answered it. You can always go back and hear exactly what was said.

f5.title: Reach beyond your region
f5.copy: You're not boxed into your own area. Your yard also reaches nearby regions, and you can switch rooms right from the phone.

f6.title: We watch your line 24/7
f6.copy: If your line goes quiet, our team is alerted within minutes and gets you back on the air — usually before you even notice.

join.heading: One flat membership. Your whole region on the line.
list: Flat monthly fee per yard — no per-call charges
Preconfigured desk phone or browser client included
Live in your regional room the day the phone arrives
Call recordings and answer-rate reporting included
join.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Set up your yard in minutes.

toast.requestReceived: Request received — we'll call your yard within one business day.
